en: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly wider than shoulders.
Unrack, lower bar to mid-chest under control.
Press up to lockout — feet planted, glutes tight.
zh-Hans: 平躺卧推凳, 握距略宽于肩.
出杠, 控制下放至胸口中部.
推至锁定 — 双脚踩实, 臀部收紧.

en: Always use a spotter or safety pins on heavy sets.
Don't flare elbows 90° — tuck slightly to protect shoulders.
Keep wrists straight, bar over base of palm.
zh-Hans: 大重量时务必使用保护或安全杠.
肘部不要 90° 外翻 — 略微内收保护肩部.
保持手腕直立, 杠铃压在掌根.

en: Lie on flat bench, dumbbells at chest level.
Press up until arms fully extended.
Lower under control — feel the chest stretch.
zh-Hans: 平躺卧推凳, 哑铃放胸口高度.
推到手臂完全伸直.
缓慢下放, 感受胸部拉伸.

en: Don't bounce dumbbells off chest at bottom.
zh-Hans: 底部不要让哑铃砸在胸口.

en: Bench centered under Smith bar, grip just past shoulder-width.
Unrack with twist, lower to mid-chest.
Press up in fixed path — full lockout.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳对准史密斯杠, 握距略宽于肩.
旋转解锁, 下放至胸口中部.
沿固定轨迹推起 — 完全锁定.

en: Re-twist bar to lock at top before stepping away.
zh-Hans: 离开前务必旋转锁杠.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with mid-chest.
Press handles forward to full extension.
Return under control — don't let stack slam.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与胸口中部齐平.
向前推至完全伸展.
控制回程 — 不要让配重砸下.

en: Bench between low cable pulleys, handles at chest.
Press cables up and slightly inward.
Hold and squeeze at top, control eccentric.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳置于低位绳索之间, 手柄置胸口.
向上推, 略向内合拢.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Grip bar shoulder-width — not narrower.
Lower to lower chest, elbows tucked close.
Press up — focus on triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 握距与肩同宽 — 不要更窄.
下放至下胸, 肘部贴近身体.
推起 — 三头发力锁定.

en: Don't grip narrower than shoulder-width — wrist strain.
Use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 握距不要比肩窄 — 容易伤手腕.
大重量需要保护.

en: Grip narrower than shoulder-width on Smith bar.
Lower to lower chest with elbows tucked.
Press in fixed path — squeeze triceps at lockout.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠上窄握, 略窄于肩.
下放至下胸, 肘部内收.
沿固定轨迹推起 — 顶部收紧三头.

en: Grip bar wider than shoulder-width (~1.5x).
Lower to upper chest with controlled tempo.
Press up — emphasize outer chest stretch.
zh-Hans: 宽握距 (约 1.5 倍肩宽).
缓慢下放至上胸.
推起 — 强化外侧胸部拉伸.

en: Wider grip = more shoulder stress. Don't go too wide.
zh-Hans: 握距越宽对肩压力越大, 不要过宽.

en: Standard bench setup, grip just past shoulders.
Lower bar to chest, pause 1-2 seconds — dead stop.
Press up explosively from pause.
zh-Hans: 标准卧推姿势, 握距略宽于肩.
下放触胸, 静止 1-2 秒 — 完全停顿.
暂停后爆发推起.

en: Pause kills momentum — start with 70% of normal bench load.
Always use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 停顿消除弹力 — 重量降到平时 70%.
务必使用安全杠或保护.

en: Set bench to 30-45° incline.
Lower bar to upper chest under control.
Press up and slightly back, full lockout.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45° 上斜.
下放至上胸, 控制速度.
向上略向后推, 完全锁定.

en: Don't go above 45° — turns into shoulder press.
Use spotter on heavy sets.
zh-Hans: 角度不要超过 45° — 否则变成肩推.
大重量需要保护.

en: Bench at 30-45° incline.
Press dumbbells up and slightly inward.
Squeeze upper chest at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 30-45° 上斜.
推起哑铃, 略向内收.
顶部收紧上胸, 控制下放.

en: Don't arch lower back excessively at top of press.
zh-Hans: 顶部不要过度反弓下背.

en: Set bench at 30-45° under Smith bar.
Lower to upper chest, controlled tempo.
Press up along fixed track.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳 30-45° 置于史密斯杠下.
下放至上胸, 控制速度.
沿固定轨道推起.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with upper chest.
Press up and slightly inward.
Lower with full control.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与上胸齐平.
向上略内推.
完全控制下放.

en: Incline bench between cable pulleys, handles at upper chest.
Press handles up and converge at top.
Squeeze upper chest, slow eccentric.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳置绳索之间, 手柄置上胸.
向上推至顶部合拢.
收紧上胸, 缓慢下放.

en: Bench at 30°, grip shoulder-width.
Lower bar to upper chest, elbows tucked.
Press up — squeeze upper chest and triceps.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30°, 握距与肩同宽.
下放至上胸, 肘部内收.
推起 — 收紧上胸和三头.

en: Bench at 15-20° low incline.
Press dumbbells up — between flat and incline path.
Targets upper-mid chest fibers.
zh-Hans: 卧推凳调至 15-20° 低斜.
推起哑铃 — 介于平推和上斜之间.
针对上中胸纤维.

en: Bench at 15-30° decline, lock feet in pads.
Unrack, lower to lower chest.
Press up — emphasize lower chest contraction.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳 15-30°, 双脚扣住固定垫.
出杠, 下放至下胸.
推起 — 强化下胸收缩.

en: Always have a spotter — getting up is awkward.
Decline can spike blood pressure — avoid if hypertensive.
zh-Hans: 务必有保护 — 起身姿势不便.
下斜会升高血压 — 高血压者避免.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, dumbbells at lower chest.
Press up and slightly inward.
Lower under full control.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, 哑铃置下胸.
向上略向内推.
完全控制下放.

en: Have spotter hand dumbbells up — getting them up alone is risky.
zh-Hans: 让保护递哑铃 — 自己抓起哑铃风险大.

en: Decline bench under Smith bar, feet locked.
Lower bar to lower chest, controlled.
Press up along fixed path.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳置史密斯杠下, 脚固定.
控制下放至下胸.
沿固定轨道推起.

en: Adjust seat so handles align with lower chest.
Press handles down and forward.
Squeeze lower chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅, 手柄与下胸齐平.
向下向前推.
收紧下胸, 缓慢回程.

en: Underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulders.
Lower bar to lower chest, elbows close.
Press up — targets upper chest hard.
zh-Hans: 反握, 握距略宽于肩.
下放至下胸, 肘部贴近.
推起 — 强烈刺激上胸.

en: Always use a spotter — grip can fail.
Start light to learn the path.
zh-Hans: 务必有保护 — 反握易脱手.
从轻重量开始熟悉轨迹.

en: Lie on floor under bar, knees bent or extended.
Lower bar until upper arms touch floor.
Pause, press to lockout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 杠铃在上, 屈膝或伸腿.
下放至大臂贴地.
暂停, 推至锁定.

en: Use a power rack with safety pins set just above chest level.
zh-Hans: 在深蹲架内做, 安全杠设在胸口上方.

en: Lie on floor with dumbbells at chest.
Press up to full extension.
Lower until triceps lightly touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 哑铃置胸口.
推至完全伸直.
下放至三头轻触地面.

en: Lie on floor, grip bar shoulder-width.
Lower until upper arms touch floor, elbows tucked.
Press up, focus on triceps lockout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 握距与肩同宽.
下放至大臂贴地, 肘部内收.
推起, 三头发力锁定.

en: Always use rack safety pins.
zh-Hans: 务必使用深蹲架安全杠.

en: Standard bench setup, grip just past shoulders.
Lower bar, pause 1-2 inches above chest.
Hold pause, then press up.
zh-Hans: 标准卧推姿势, 握距略宽于肩.
下放, 停在胸口上方 2-5 cm.
维持暂停, 然后推起.

en: Pause hover requires control — start light.
Use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 悬停需要控制 — 从轻开始.
使用安全杠或保护.

en: Lie on bench, press dumbbells together throughout set.
Press up while squeezing dumbbells.
Maintain inward pressure on every rep.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 全程将哑铃夹紧.
夹紧哑铃同时推起.
每次重复都保持向内挤压.

en: Stand holding plate between palms at chest.
Press plate forward, squeezing throughout.
Return slowly — maintain plate squeeze.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双掌夹片置胸前.
向前推, 全程挤压.
缓慢回程 — 持续夹紧.

en: Lie on flat bench, arms over chest, slight elbow bend.
Open arms wide in arc until chest stretch.
Squeeze chest to bring dumbbells back together.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双臂胸前微屈.
弧线打开双臂至胸部拉伸.
胸部发力合拢哑铃.

en: Don't go too low — risk of shoulder strain. Stop at chest depth.
zh-Hans: 不要过低 — 容易拉伤肩部, 与胸口齐平即可.

en: Bench at 30-45° incline, arms over upper chest.
Open arms wide in slow arc.
Squeeze upper chest to return.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 双臂上胸前方.
缓慢弧线打开.
上胸发力合拢.

en: Decline bench, feet locked, arms over lower chest.
Open arms wide in arc.
Squeeze lower chest to close.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳, 脚固定, 双臂下胸前方.
弧线打开双臂.
下胸发力合拢.

en: Lie on bench between mid-height pulleys.
Arms wide, slight bend, bring handles together over chest.
Squeeze, then open with control.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 置中位绳索之间.
双臂打开微屈, 胸前合拢手柄.
顶部收紧, 控制打开.

en: Incline bench between low pulleys.
Pull handles up and inward over upper chest.
Squeeze upper chest, open with control.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳置低位绳索之间.
向上向内拉至上胸前方.
收紧上胸, 控制打开.

en: Decline bench between high pulleys.
Pull handles down and across lower chest.
Squeeze, control return.
zh-Hans: 下斜凳置高位绳索之间.
向下向内拉至下胸前方.
收紧, 控制回程.

en: Stand between high pulleys, slight forward lean.
Pull handles down and across midline, hands meet at waist.
Squeeze lower chest, open slowly.
zh-Hans: 站在高位绳索之间, 略前倾.
向下向内拉, 双手腰前交叉.
收紧下胸, 缓慢打开.

en: Stand between low pulleys, slight forward lean.
Pull handles up and inward to meet at chin level.
Squeeze upper chest, control return.
zh-Hans: 站在低位绳索之间, 略前倾.
向上向内拉至下巴前方.
收紧上胸, 控制回程.

en: Stand between mid-height pulleys, staggered stance.
Pull handles together at sternum, slight bend in elbows.
Squeeze, open with control.
zh-Hans: 站在中位绳索之间, 错步.
胸口前合拢手柄, 肘部微屈.
收紧, 控制打开.

en: Stand sideways to cable, one handle in working arm.
Pull across body, squeezing chest.
Slow return — full stretch at end.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 单手握手柄.
跨过身体内拉, 胸部发力.
缓慢回程 — 末端充分拉伸.

en: Adjust seat — elbows or wrists align with shoulders.
Bring pads together by squeezing chest.
Open with control, feel the stretch.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅 — 肘或腕与肩齐平.
胸部发力合拢挡板.
控制打开, 感受拉伸.

en: Sit facing pec deck pads, grip handles.
Press handles inward across chest.
Hold contraction at midline.
zh-Hans: 面对蝴蝶机坐下, 握住手柄.
向胸前内推合拢.
中线保持收紧.

en: Sit with back flat against pad, handles wide.
Bring handles together in front of chest.
Squeeze and return slow.
zh-Hans: 坐好背贴靠垫, 手柄两侧.
胸前合拢双手柄.
收紧并缓慢回程.

en: Lie on bench, hold one dumbbell above chest with both hands.
Lower behind head in arc, slight elbow bend.
Pull back over chest, feel chest and lats.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双手抱一只哑铃于胸上方.
弧线下放至头后, 肘部微屈.
拉回胸前, 感受胸背.

en: Don't go beyond shoulder mobility — risk of impingement.
zh-Hans: 不要超过肩部活动范围 — 容易撞击.

en: Lie on bench, grip bar slightly narrower than shoulders.
Lower bar in arc behind head, slight elbow bend.
Pull back to over chest.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 握距略窄于肩.
弧线下放杠铃至头后, 肘部微屈.
拉回至胸上方.

en: Start with light weight — heavy shoulder demand.
zh-Hans: 从轻重量开始 — 对肩压力大.

en: Stand facing cable, high pulley, straight bar attachment.
Arms straight, pull bar down to thighs.
Hold, control back up.
zh-Hans: 面对绳索机, 高位定滑轮, 直杆.
手臂伸直, 下拉至大腿前.
保持收紧, 控制回程.

en: Plank position, hands shoulder-width.
Lower chest to floor — body straight.
Press up, full elbow extension.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽.
胸部下降至接近地面 — 身体保持直线.
推起, 手肘完全伸直.

en: Hands on bench, body in plank.
Lower chest to bench, body straight.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 双手撑凳, 身体呈平板.
下降至胸触凳, 身体保持直线.
推至完全伸直.

en: Feet elevated on bench, hands on floor.
Lower upper chest to floor.
Press up — keep body line straight.
zh-Hans: 双脚抬高在凳上, 双手撑地.
上胸下降至接近地面.
推起 — 身体保持直线.

en: Plank, hands wider than shoulders.
Lower chest to floor — emphasize chest stretch.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手宽于肩.
胸部下降 — 强化胸部拉伸.
推至完全伸直.

en: Hands together, thumbs and index fingers forming diamond.
Lower chest to hands — elbows tucked.
Press up — squeeze triceps.
zh-Hans: 双手并拢, 拇指食指构成菱形.
胸部下降至手部 — 肘部内收.
推起 — 收紧三头.

en: Plank, hands shoulder-width or slightly narrower.
Lower chest, elbows brushing ribs.
Press up — drive with triceps.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 双手与肩同宽或略窄.
胸部下降, 肘部贴近肋骨.
推起 — 三头发力.

en: Knees on floor, hands shoulder-width.
Lower chest to floor — body straight from knees to head.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 膝盖着地, 双手与肩同宽.
胸部下降 — 膝至头一条直线.
推至完全伸直.

en: Wide push-up start, hands far apart.
Lower toward one side, other arm extends straight.
Push back up, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 宽距俯卧撑姿势, 双手分开很远.
下降至单侧, 另一臂伸直.
推起, 左右交替.

en: High shoulder demand — master regular push-up first.
zh-Hans: 对肩部要求高 — 先掌握标准俯卧撑.

en: Wide foot stance, one hand behind back.
Lower torso to floor under control.
Press up — core resists rotation.
zh-Hans: 双脚宽距, 一手背后.
控制下放躯干至地面.
推起 — 核心抗旋转.

en: Advanced movement — work up via archer push-ups.
Don't lower if you can't press back up.
zh-Hans: 进阶动作 — 先做弓箭手俯卧撑.
推不起就不要下放.

en: Standard push-up start, hands shoulder-width.
Lower fast, explode up — hands leave floor.
Clap in mid-air, land hands and absorb.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势, 双手与肩同宽.
快速下降, 爆发推起 — 双手离地.
空中击掌, 落地缓冲.

en: High impact on wrists — build up wrist strength first.
Land with bent elbows to absorb impact.
zh-Hans: 手腕承受冲击 — 先练手腕力量.
屈肘落地缓冲冲击.

en: Standard push-up position.
Lower, then explode up — hands leave floor.
Land softly with bent elbows.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势.
下降, 爆发推起 — 双手离地.
屈肘缓冲落地.

en: High wrist stress — proper landing critical.
zh-Hans: 手腕压力大 — 注意落地姿势.

en: Hands at hip level, fingers pointing back.
Lean forward, shoulders past wrists.
Lower and press in leaning position.
zh-Hans: 双手置于髋部, 指尖向后.
前倾, 肩超过手腕.
前倾姿势下俯卧撑.

en: Heavy wrist load — warm wrists first.
zh-Hans: 手腕负荷大 — 先充分热身手腕.

en: Downward dog position, hips high.
Lower head toward floor between hands.
Press back up — keep hips high.
zh-Hans: 下犬式, 髋部抬高.
头部下降至双手之间.
推起 — 髋部保持高位.

en: Standard push-up position.
Lower while bringing one knee to outside elbow.
Press up, alternate knees.
zh-Hans: 标准俯卧撑姿势.
下降时一膝向外肘部移动.
推起, 左右交替.

en: Weight plate or vest on upper back.
Push-up position, lower chest to floor.
Press up — maintain straight body line.
zh-Hans: 上背放杠铃片或穿负重背心.
俯卧撑姿势, 胸部下降至地.
推起 — 身体保持直线.

en: Have plate placed by partner — don't twist to add weight.
zh-Hans: 让人帮忙放片 — 不要扭身放片.

en: Hands on push-up bars or elevated blocks.
Lower chest below hand level — full stretch.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 双手撑俯卧撑架或垫块.
胸部下降至低于手 — 充分拉伸.
推至完全伸直.

en: Downward dog start, hips high.
Swoop chest forward and down in arc.
Finish in upward dog, reverse back.
zh-Hans: 下犬式起始, 髋部高.
弧线划过, 胸前下移.
结束于上犬式, 反向回到起点.

en: Wide push-up, lower body to one side.
Slide chest horizontally to opposite side.
Press up — repeat alternating.
zh-Hans: 宽距俯卧撑, 下降至一侧.
胸部水平滑动到另一侧.
推起 — 左右交替.

en: Band across upper back, ends in palms.
Push-up position, hands shoulder-width.
Lower and press — band adds resistance at top.
zh-Hans: 弹力带绕过上背, 两端握在掌心.
俯卧撑姿势, 双手与肩同宽.
下放推起 — 顶部弹力增加阻力.

en: On parallel bars, lean torso forward.
Lower until shoulders below elbows — chest stretch.
Press up — squeeze chest.
zh-Hans: 双杠上, 上身前倾.
下降至肩低于肘 — 胸部拉伸.
推起 — 胸部收紧.

en: Don't go too deep if you feel shoulder pain.
Build up to bodyweight slowly.
zh-Hans: 肩痛不要下太低.
逐步过渡到自重.

en: Plate or dumbbell on dip belt.
Lean forward, lower to chest stretch.
Press up — keep chest engaged.
zh-Hans: 腰挂负重腰带或哑铃.
前倾, 下降至胸部拉伸.
推起 — 持续刺激胸部.

en: Master bodyweight dips before adding load.
Don't bounce out of bottom — shoulder injury risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握自重双杠.
底部不要弹起 — 易伤肩.

en: Kneel on assist pad, grip parallel bars.
Lean forward, lower until chest stretch.
Press up — machine takes some weight.
zh-Hans: 膝盖跪助力垫, 双杠握紧.
前倾下降至胸部拉伸.
推起 — 机器提供助力.

en: Sit, grip handles wider than shoulders.
Press handles down by leaning forward.
Squeeze chest at bottom, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 握距宽于肩.
前倾向下推手柄.
底部收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Support on rings, rings turned out at top.
Lower with chest forward, control rings.
Press up — turn rings out at top.
zh-Hans: 撑住吊环, 顶部外旋.
胸部前倾下降, 控制吊环.
推起 — 顶部外旋.

en: Rings are unstable — master bar dips first.
Don't drop below 90° elbow if shoulders unstable.
zh-Hans: 吊环不稳 — 先掌握双杠.
肩部不稳不要降至肘 90°.

en: Hold end of barbell at shoulder, anchor on floor.
Press bar up and forward at angle.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 杠铃一端固定地面, 另一端置肩.
斜上方向前推.
控制下放.

en: Both hands cup end of barbell at chest.
Press up and forward at angle.
Lower under control to chest.
zh-Hans: 双手抱杠铃一端置胸前.
斜上方向前推.
控制下放至胸口.

en: Lie on bench, one dumbbell in working hand.
Press up — core resists rotation.
Lower under control, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 单手持哑铃.
推起 — 核心抗旋转.
控制下放, 换边.

en: Lie on bench, palms face each other.
Press dumbbells up with neutral grip.
Lower to chest, elbows tucked.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 掌心相对.
中立握推起哑铃.
下放至胸口, 肘部内收.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face each other.
Press dumbbells up.
Lower under control, elbows tucked.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 掌心相对.
向上推起.
控制下放, 肘部内收.

en: Hold one dumbbell horizontally between palms.
Squeeze palms together — push inward hard.
Hold contraction, repeat or hold isometric.
zh-Hans: 双掌横夹一只哑铃.
双掌向内挤压.
保持收紧, 重复或维持等长.

en: Bench press setup, wide grip, elbows flared.
Lower bar to throat/clavicle, slow tempo.
Press up — emphasizes upper chest.
zh-Hans: 卧推姿势, 宽握, 肘部外展.
缓慢下放至喉部/锁骨.
推起 — 强化上胸.

en: High shoulder risk — start very light.
Always use safety pins or spotter.
zh-Hans: 对肩压力大 — 从极轻开始.
务必使用安全杠或保护.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells at sides of hips.
Sweep in arc up and around to overhead.
Return along same arc — chest stays engaged.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃置髋两侧.
弧线划过, 上举至头顶.
沿原路径回程 — 胸部持续发力.

en: Stand facing away from cable, mid pulleys, handles at chest.
Press handles forward, slight downward arc.
Squeeze chest, slow eccentric.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 中位, 手柄置胸口.
向前推, 略向下弧线.
收紧胸部, 控制回程.

en: Stand facing away from cable, one handle in working hand.
Press across body to opposite shoulder line.
Squeeze, slow return — core resists rotation.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 单手握手柄.
跨过身体向对侧推.
收紧, 缓慢回程 — 核心抗旋转.

en: Stand facing away from cable, low pulleys, handles at waist.
Press up and forward to upper chest height.
Squeeze upper chest, control return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 低位, 手柄置腰.
向前向上推至上胸高度.
收紧上胸, 控制回程.

en: Stand facing away from cable, high pulleys, handles at shoulders.
Press down and forward to hip level.
Squeeze lower chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 背对绳索, 高位, 手柄置肩部.
向下向前推至腰部.
收紧下胸, 缓慢回程.

en: Lie on floor with kettlebells at chest, knees bent.
Press up to lockout.
Lower until upper arms touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 壶铃置胸口, 屈膝.
推至锁定.
下放至大臂贴地.

en: Lie on bench with kettlebells racked at shoulders.
Press up to lockout — bells rest on back of wrist.
Lower controlled — stable wrist.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 壶铃置肩部.
推至锁定 — 壶铃靠在腕背.
控制下放 — 手腕稳定.

en: Anchor band behind, handles at chest.
Press forward to full extension.
Squeeze chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定身后, 手柄置胸口.
向前推至完全伸直.
收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Anchor band behind at shoulder height.
Arms wide, slight bend — bring hands together in arc.
Squeeze chest, control opening.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定身后肩高.
双臂打开微屈 — 弧线合拢双手.
收紧胸部, 控制打开.

en: One hand on med ball, other on floor.
Lower chest toward floor.
Press up, optionally roll ball to other hand.
zh-Hans: 一手撑药球, 一手撑地.
胸部下降至接近地面.
推起, 可将球滚至另一手.

en: Push-up position, arms locked straight.
Squeeze shoulder blades together, chest dips.
Push apart, chest rises — arms stay locked.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑姿势, 双臂锁直.
肩胛骨内收, 胸部下沉.
肩胛打开, 胸部上抬 — 手臂保持锁定.

en: Rings just above floor, plank position.
Lower chest to rings, body straight.
Press up — turn rings out at top.
zh-Hans: 吊环略高于地, 平板姿势.
下降至胸接近吊环, 身体保持直线.
推起 — 顶部外旋.

en: Rings are unstable — master fixed push-ups first.
zh-Hans: 吊环不稳定 — 先掌握普通俯卧撑.

en: Grip TRX handles, lean forward — body straight.
Lower chest to handles, control descent.
Press back up to start.
zh-Hans: 握紧 TRX 手柄, 前倾 — 身体保持直线.
胸部下降至手柄, 控制下放.
推回起点.

en: Grip TRX, lean forward, arms forward together.
Open arms wide in arc, lower chest.
Squeeze chest to close — slight elbow bend.
zh-Hans: 握 TRX, 前倾, 双臂前并拢.
弧线打开双臂, 胸部下沉.
胸部发力合拢 — 肘部微屈.

en: Feet in TRX foot cradles, hands on floor.
Push-up with elevated, unstable feet.
Stabilize core throughout.
zh-Hans: 双脚扣 TRX 脚环, 双手撑地.
在抬高且不稳定的支撑下做俯卧撑.
全程稳定核心.

en: Lie on bench, both dumbbells at chest.
Press one up, lower while other presses.
Alternate continuously.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 双哑铃置胸口.
推起一只, 推另一只时下放.
持续交替.

en: Unrack bar at lockout, hold straight-arm position.
Maintain tension for 20-60 seconds.
Rack carefully — fatigue is real.
zh-Hans: 出杠至锁定位, 保持伸臂.
维持紧张 20-60 秒.
小心放回 — 末段易力竭.

en: Always have a spotter for static holds.
Set safety pins at chest level.
zh-Hans: 静态保持务必有保护.
安全杠设在胸口高度.

en: Press palms together at chest height.
Push inward — chest fully engaged.
Hold 15-30 seconds.
zh-Hans: 双掌胸前合拢.
向内挤压 — 胸部完全收紧.

en: Hands on bench, band across upper back.
Lower chest to bench, body straight.
Press up — band increases resistance at top.
zh-Hans: 双手撑凳, 弹力带绕上背.
胸部下降至凳, 身体保持直线.
推起 — 顶部弹力增强.

en: Set Smith bar low, single dumbbell or single arm grip.
Use bar as anchor for cross-body fly motion.
Squeeze chest at end range.
zh-Hans: 史密斯杠置低位, 单手握杠或加哑铃.
杠作支点做交叉飞鸟动作.
末端收紧胸部.

en: Lie on floor, one dumbbell in working hand, knees bent.
Press up to lockout — core anti-rotation.
Lower until tricep touches floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧地面, 单手持哑铃, 屈膝.
推至锁定 — 核心抗旋转.
下放至三头触地.

name.zh-Hans: 单臂绳索夹胸 (高位向下)

en: Stand sideways to high pulley, working arm grabs handle.
Pull down and across body to opposite hip.
Squeeze, slow return.
zh-Hans: 侧对高位绳索, 单手握手柄.
向下跨过身体拉至对侧髋.
收紧, 缓慢回程.

name.zh-Hans: 单臂绳索夹胸 (低位向上)

en: Stand sideways to low pulley, working arm grips handle.
Pull up and across body to opposite shoulder.
Squeeze upper chest, control eccentric.
zh-Hans: 侧对低位绳索, 单手握手柄.
向上跨过身体拉至对侧肩.
收紧上胸, 控制下放.

en: Grip push-up handles, shoulder-width.
Lower chest below handle level — deeper range.
Press up to full extension.
zh-Hans: 握住推手架, 与肩同宽.
胸部下降至低于握把 — 行程更深.
推至完全伸直.

en: Lie on bench, dumbbells start at sides of hips.
Arc up to overhead, then return to start.
Light weight only — full 180° motion.
zh-Hans: 平躺凳上, 哑铃从髋两侧开始.
弧线划过至头顶, 再回到起点.
仅用轻重量 — 完整 180° 行程.

en: Use very light weight — extreme range stresses shoulders.
zh-Hans: 仅用极轻重量 — 大行程对肩压力大.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face each other.
Open arms wide in arc, slight bend.
Squeeze upper chest to close.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 掌心相对.
弧线打开双臂, 微屈肘.
收紧上胸合拢.

en: Sit at pec deck, one arm only.
Squeeze chest to bring handle to midline.
Open with control, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐于蝴蝶机, 单臂操作.
胸部发力将手柄合至中线.
控制打开, 换边.

en: Face wall arm's length away, hands at chest height.
Lean in, lower chest to wall.
Push back to start, body straight.
zh-Hans: 面对墙一臂距, 双手胸高.
前倾, 胸接近墙面.
推回起点, 身体保持直线.

en: Kneel facing away from cable, handles at chest.
Press forward to full extension.
Slow return — core stays tight.
zh-Hans: 跪姿背对绳索, 手柄置胸口.
向前推至完全伸直.
缓慢回程 — 核心保持收紧.

en: Bench at slight incline (15-20°), chest supported.
Press dumbbells from outside chest upward.
Lower with control.
zh-Hans: 凳调至 15-20° 轻斜, 胸前贴凳.
哑铃从胸两侧向上推.
控制下放.

name.zh-Hans: 窄距上斜卧推 (史密斯机)

en: Set bench 30°, narrow grip on Smith bar.
Lower to upper chest, elbows tucked.
Press along fixed path — squeeze tris.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30°, 窄握史密斯杠.
下放至上胸, 肘部内收.
沿固定轨道推起 — 收紧三头.

en: Lie perpendicular on bench, only upper back on pad.
Hips low, both hands cup one dumbbell over chest.
Lower in arc behind head, return.
zh-Hans: 垂直横躺凳, 仅上背在凳上.
髋部低, 双手抱一只哑铃于胸上方.
弧线下放至头后, 回到起点.

en: Drop hips low for max stretch — but watch shoulders.
zh-Hans: 髋部下沉以增加拉伸 — 注意肩部.

en: Start at top of push-up, body straight.
Lower over 3-5 seconds until chest touches floor.
Reset to top (knees if needed), repeat.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑顶部姿势, 身体保持直线.
缓慢下放 3-5 秒至胸触地.
回到顶部 (必要时跪姿), 重复.

en: Downward dog, hips high.
Swoop down then forward in deep arc.
Reverse motion back to start.
zh-Hans: 下犬式, 髋部高.
弧线下沉再前推.
反向回到起点.

en: Adjust seat — handles at chest height.
Press one arm at a time or both independently.
Squeeze chest at lockout.
zh-Hans: 调整座椅 — 手柄与胸齐.
单臂逐次或双臂独立推.
锁定位收紧胸部.

en: Load plates, sit with back against pad.
Press handles forward, full extension.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 装片, 坐姿背贴靠垫.
向前推至完全伸直.
控制下放.

en: Load plates, sit on incline seat.
Press handles up and forward.
Lower with control to chest.
zh-Hans: 装片, 坐于上斜座.
向上向前推.
控制下放至胸口.

en: Use 50-60% 1RM, standard bench setup.
Lower under control, explode up fast.
Reset, repeat — focus on speed.
zh-Hans: 用 1RM 的 50-60%, 标准卧推姿势.
控制下放, 爆发上推.
重置, 重复 — 注重速度.

en: Speed work needs perfect form — don't sacrifice control.
Always use spotter or safety pins.
zh-Hans: 速度训练要保持完美动作 — 不要失去控制.
务必有保护或安全杠.

en: Drape chains over bar — links pile on floor at bottom.
Standard bench press — load increases at lockout.
Lower under control as chain weight drops off.
zh-Hans: 链条挂在杠铃两侧 — 底部链节堆地.
标准卧推 — 顶部负荷增加.
控制下放, 链条重量随之降低.

en: Chains require careful setup — secure them.
Use safety pins.
zh-Hans: 链条要固定好 — 安装认真.
使用安全杠.

en: Anchor bands to bench or floor, loop around bar.
Bench press — bands tighten at lockout.
Strong tension at top, light at bottom.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定凳或地面, 套在杠上.
卧推 — 顶部弹力增强.
顶部张力大, 底部小.

en: Band setup must be secure — failure is dangerous.
Use safety pins.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定要牢 — 失败有危险.
使用安全杠.

en: Iso-lateral machine, sit with back against pad.
Press one arm, return, then press other.
Keep torso stable throughout.
zh-Hans: 分臂器械, 坐姿背贴靠垫.
推一臂, 回程, 再推另一臂.
全程躯干稳定.

en: Incline bench, dumbbells pressed together at chest.
Press up while keeping dumbbells touching.
Maintain inward pressure throughout.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳, 哑铃胸前夹紧.
向上推, 哑铃保持接触.
全程保持向内挤压.

en: Incline bench 30-45°, palms face up underhand.
Open arms in wide arc, slight elbow bend.
Squeeze upper chest hard at top.
zh-Hans: 上斜凳 30-45°, 反握 (掌心向上).
弧线打开双臂, 肘微屈.
顶部强力收紧上胸.

en: Sit on bench between mid pulleys, handles at chest.
Press handles forward to full extension.
Squeeze chest, slow return.
zh-Hans: 坐于凳上置中位绳索之间, 手柄置胸.
向前推至完全伸直.
收紧胸部, 缓慢回程.

en: Bench at low incline, behind landmine setup.
Both hands cup bar end at chest.
Press up and forward, slow return.
zh-Hans: 凳调至低斜, 置于地雷管设置后.
双手抱杠铃端置胸前.
向上向前推, 缓慢回程.
